bundle_title: AP CSP Create Task Planning + Rubric Checklist Pack

planning_prompts.prompt: Describe your program’s purpose and target user.
List your input(s) and output(s) and how they are produced.
Identify one list (or collection) you will use and why it’s necessary.
Describe the algorithm that uses sequencing, selection, and iteration.
Write a short test plan: 3 tests with expected vs actual results.

items.check: Uses a list/collection and explains why it manages complexity.
Algorithm includes sequencing, selection, and iteration.
Student-developed procedure with parameter(s) is shown.
Includes at least two test cases with expected results.

feedback_templates: Add one sentence explaining how your list makes the program easier to update or expand.
Show where selection (if/else) changes behavior for different inputs.
Include one more test that targets an edge case.
